title: Vector Calculus Identities for Gradient Optimization
description: A flowchart showing the relationships between key vector calculus identities used to compute gradients, which are foundational for optimization techniques.
relationships: Gradient is the derivative of a scalar field
Divergence and Curl operate on vector fields derived from Gradient
Product and Chain Rules enable decomposition of complex functions
Identities simplify gradient computation for optimization algorithms
Laplacian and Second Derivative Test are used in critical point analysis
